functional_requirements.title: Add Student
functional_requirements.description: Add a new student with name and ID.

functional_requirements.title: Add Assignment
functional_requirements.description: Add a new assignment with name and total points.

functional_requirements.title: Record Grade
functional_requirements.description: Record a grade for a student on an assignment.

functional_requirements.title: Calculate Student Average
functional_requirements.description: Calculate the average grade for a student across all assignments.

functional_requirements.title: Calculate Class Average
functional_requirements.description: Calculate the average grade for the entire class on an assignment.

functional_requirements.title: Generate Report Card
functional_requirements.description: Generate a report card for a student showing all grades and final average.

functional_requirements.title: List Students
functional_requirements.description: List all students with their IDs.

functional_requirements.title: List Assignments
functional_requirements.description: List all assignments with total points.

non_functional_requirements.description: The system should be usable via command line interface with clear prompts.
The system should handle invalid inputs gracefully without crashing.

acceptance_criteria.description: Adding a student with a unique ID succeeds.
Adding a student with a duplicate ID shows an error.
Recording a grade for a non-existent student shows an error.
Recording a grade for a non-existent assignment shows an error.
Recording a grade with points exceeding total points shows an error.
Calculating student average returns correct percentage.
Calculating class average returns correct percentage.
Report card includes all grades and final average.

storage.details: Data is stored in memory and lost when program exits.

glossary.Student: A person enrolled in the class, identified by a unique ID.
glossary.Assignment: A task or exam with a total possible points.
glossary.Grade: The points earned by a student on an assignment.
glossary.Average: The mean of percentages across assignments.

global_state_sources.description: Maps student ID to student name.
Maps assignment name to total points.

input_spec.description: Commands are entered via command line arguments. First argument is the command, subsequent arguments are parameters.

schema.command: string (e.g., add_student, add_assignment, record_grade, student_average, class_average, report_card, list_students, list_assignments)

output_spec.description: Output is plain text printed to stdout. Success messages or error messages are displayed.
